title: melicope degeneri
intro: Melicope degeneri, also known as the Tahitian rue, is a tropical evergreen shrub native to French Polynesia and other Pacific Island nations. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Melicope degeneri include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
